title: Create: Gunsmithing
description: Adds steampunk guns to the Create mod
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7KCNsGPM/images/725f50782838262607c15d79166127623884f4ab.png)
## Create: Gunsmithing
This mod adds fully animated steampunk guns that can be crafted using the Create mod mechanics.

You can add new weapons or edit existing ones using NTGL gun packs, more info on [NTGL wiki](https://github.com/Jetug/NukaTeamGunLib/wiki)

**Warning: This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [NTGL](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntgl)**

### Guns
- Flintlock
- Revolver
- Shotgun
- Nailgun
- Gatling
- Blazegun
- Launcher
- Pneumatic Hammer
- Frag Grenade
- And more will be added in the future
![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7KCNsGPM/images/dbd208af93091fc2babfee71b3f58006a55a7f80.png)
